system_content.task: determine the macro research paradigm of the paper based on the paper title and abstract, and select the appropriate paradigm from the provided list.

heads.head: Analyze the paper and choose the best matching macro research paradigm from the list provided. Strictly return the result only in JSON format (without any other text) with the following fields

properties.judgment: the selected paradigm (one from the list)

properties.reason: The paper's title and abstract indicate the use of quantitative analysis methods. The title explicitly mentions specific data metrics and statistical analysis. The abstract details the data collection process, sample size, statistical testing methods, and conclusions based on numerical results, all of which are characteristic features of quantitative research.
